title: RSW Set Of 2 Breakfast To Go Snack Pots With Spoon Travel Cereal Tub & Lid Lunch Pot 350ml (AM4024)
description: Set of 2 breakfast to go snack pots. Breakfast is an easy meal skip or remember, especially if you have a busy lifestyle. With breakfast being the most important meal of the day, these handy breakfast to go pots are perfect for a quick easy meal on the go. The perfectly portions pots are designed to fill with your favorite cereal or fruit with a separate compartment for milk/yoghurt. Ideal for oats, granola and fresh fruits and perfect for mix and match snacks. Not only are they ideal for breakfast, but they can also be used for small lunches such as pasta, soups and salads too. Each pot measures approximately 15cm in height x 8cm width at the widest point and can hold a capacity of 350ml approximately. They also feature a dome shape lid which easily screws on and off when required. Hand wash only. Not suitable for use in microwave ovens or dishwashers. Colour will be supplied at random and may vary images shown. To avoid disappointment, please avoid adding a note to seller at checkout as this will not be seen.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Cereal, Fruits, Milk, Yoghurt, Pasta, Soups, Salads
